name: Lt. Gen. Yasser al-Atta
role: SAF Chief of Staff (appointed April 2026); replaces Gen. Othman al-Hussein in Sudan's largest command shakeup since the war began
quote: The armed forces will pursue the war to its conclusion and restore the Sudanese state across all its territory. No rebel force will be allowed to persist.

name: Gen. Abdel Fattah al-Burhan
role: SAF Commander-in-Chief; De Facto Head of State (Port Sudan Government)
quote: The Rapid Support Forces are a rebel group outside the framework of the state, and they will be dealt with accordingly.

name: Gen. Mohamed Hamdan Dagalo (Hemedti)
role: RSF Commander; Head of RSF 'Government of Peace and Unity'; his brother Abdul Rahim sanctioned by UNSC March 29, 2026
quote: We fight for the people of Sudan. The army wants to return Sudan to the dark days of the Bashir regime, and we will not allow it.

name: Abdalla Hamdok
role: Former Prime Minister (2019–2022); Taqaddum Civilian Coalition Leader
quote: What is happening in Sudan is a war of generals who are fighting over power and wealth, at the expense of the Sudanese people and their democratic aspirations.

name: Khamis Abakar
quote: What is happening in West Darfur is genocide. The RSF and the Arab militias are committing massacres against the Masalit people.

name: Minni Minnawi
role: Sudan Liberation Army (SLA-MM) Leader; North Darfur Governor
quote: El Fasher must not fall. If El Fasher falls, the genocide will be complete. The international community must act before it is too late.

name: Jibril Ibrahim
role: Justice and Equality Movement (JEM) Leader; Finance Minister (SAF government)
quote: The RSF is a criminal organization that must be dismantled. There can be no peace in Sudan until the RSF is defeated and disarmed.

name: Volker Perthes
quote: There is no military solution to this conflict. Both parties must commit to a genuine ceasefire and return to negotiations to spare the Sudanese people further suffering.

name: Ramtane Lamamra
role: Former African Union High Representative / Former UN Envoy for Sudan (replaced Feb 2026)
quote: The African Union calls on both parties to immediately cease hostilities and engage in dialogue. Sudan's crisis threatens the stability of the entire region.

name: Pekka Haavisto
role: UN Secretary-General's Personal Envoy for Sudan (appointed Feb 2026)
quote: The United Nations remains committed to facilitating a ceasefire and protecting civilians. We call on all parties to engage with the peace process in good faith.

name: Martin Griffiths
quote: Sudan is now the world's largest humanitarian crisis. Never in modern history have so many people faced starvation and famine as in Sudan today.

name: Tom Perriello
quote: The death toll in Sudan may be as high as 400,000 people. This is one of the worst humanitarian disasters in the world and the international response has been wholly inadequate.

name: Sameh Shoukry
role: Egyptian Foreign Minister; SAF diplomatic ally
quote: Egypt fully supports the legitimate Sudanese Armed Forces in their effort to restore order and state authority. Sudan's security is directly linked to Egypt's security.

name: Mahamat Déby
role: President of Chad; humanitarian border management
quote: Chad cannot close its border to Sudanese brothers fleeing the war. But we need urgent international support to address this massive refugee crisis.

name: Osman Hussein
quote: We call on the Security Council to take decisive action against the RSF and those who fund them. The UAE's role in financing this genocide cannot continue without consequences.

name: Mariam al-Mahdi
role: National Umma Party; Democratic Unionist civilian opposition
quote: Both generals must be held accountable. This war was started by two military men fighting over power — neither represents the democratic aspirations of the Sudanese people.

name: Abdelaziz al-Hilu
role: Sudan People's Liberation Movement-North (SPLM-N) Leader, South Kordofan
quote: The war between SAF and RSF has created an opportunity to resolve Sudan's structural problems through a secular democratic state, but the international community ignores Sudan's marginalized peoples.

name: Filippo Grandi
quote: Sudan now has the world's largest displacement crisis. Twelve million people have been forced from their homes in a war that has been largely ignored by the international community.

name: Abdallah Adam Ismail
role: Massalit community leader; West Darfur survivor advocate
quote: The Massalit are being exterminated. We had nothing to do with this war between the generals. The RSF targeted us because of who we are — Massalit, Africans, not Arab.
